channel.title: GitHub Shell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Shell in GitHub

item.title: pystardust/ani-cli
item.description: A cli tool to browse and play anime

item.title: RPi-Distro/pi-gen
item.description: Tool used to create the official Raspberry Pi OS images

item.title: prasanthrangan/hyprdots
item.description: // Aesthetic, dynamic and minimal dots for Arch hyprland

item.title: dylanaraps/neofetch
item.description: 🖼️ A command-line system information tool written in bash 3.2+

item.title: awesome-jellyfin/awesome-jellyfin
item.description: A collection of awesome Jellyfin Plugins, Themes. Guides and Companion Software (Not affiliated with Jellyfin)

item.title: ublue-os/bazzite
item.description: Bazzite is a cloud native image built upon Fedora Atomic Desktops that brings the best of Linux gaming to all of your devices - including your favorite handheld.

item.title: nvm-sh/nvm
item.description: Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

item.title: akinomyoga/ble.sh
item.description: Bash Line Editor―a line editor written in pure Bash with syntax highlighting, auto suggestions, vim modes, etc. for Bash interactive sessions.

item.title: p8952/bocker
item.description: Docker implemented in around 100 lines of bash

item.title: docker-mailserver/docker-mailserver
item.description: Production-ready fullstack but simple mail server (SMTP, IMAP, LDAP, Antispam, Antivirus, etc.) running inside a container.
